title: anthurium schottianum
intro: Anthurium schottianum, also known as the Queen of the Andes, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Arum family. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Anthurium schottianum include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
